data.title: Create /dso:review-stats skill wrapper
data.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/skills/review-stats/SKILL.md — thin skill wrapper for review-stats.sh.

Content: frontmatter (name, description, usage), body that invokes .claude/scripts/dso review-stats.sh with any user-provided args (--since, --all).

## TDD Requirement
Exemption criterion 3: thin skill wrapper with no conditional logic. Structural validation only.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/review-stats/SKILL.md (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Skill file exists. Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/review-stats/SKILL.md
- [ ] Skill references review-stats.sh. Verify: grep -q "review-stats" plugins/dso/skills/review-stats/SKILL.md
